hook.summary: High-energy 3D marble race through a futuristic space environment.
hook.visual_action: Colorful marbles speed down a glowing purple track in space, passing a large planet.

scene_flow: Marbles speed down a linear space track with high-energy chanting music.
The camera follows the marbles as they enter a spiral loop around a moon.
A splash screen appears with the event title 'Marble Race to the Moon' and a prize announcement.
Final screen displays the prize pool, event schedule, and app promotion.
on_screen_text: UNE SEULE RÈGLE : CHOISIR LA BONNE BILLE !
audience_proxy: French-speaking adults interested in sports betting and competitive casual games.
